description: A reopened operational issue should still produce a durable reasoning packet for follow-up.

payload.meetingNotes: Look for recurring release blockers and reopen events.
payload.focusSummary: The same alert-routing problem has returned after the last fix.
reasoningChecklist: Ensure the durable issue remains visible

focusAreas.detail: The previous mitigation did not hold, and the same operational escalation path is failing again.
evidence: Theo: The alert owner drift came back after the last handoff.
